content: Tauri 2.0 + Next.js static export requires: output:'export' in next.config, frontendDist:'../out' in tauri.conf.json, images.unoptimized:true. CSP must include asset: and http://asset.localhost for image loading. assetProtocol must be enabled in tauri.conf.json. No Android-specific official docs yet; general WebView pitfall is CORS on custom protocols. Omitting output:'export' breaks the app entirely; wrong assetPrefix causes asset resolution failures.
